title: pimpinella likiangensis
intro: Pimpinella likiangensis is a plant species belonging to the carrot family, Apiaceae, and is commonly known as the Likiang parsley fern. This plant has been traditionally used in Tibetan medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Pimpinella likiangensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Pimpinella likiangensis is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
